data.task: Fetch all overdue invoices and send a chase email for each one. Match the tone to the chase stage based on days overdue. Write in the customer's language.

data.output:
[
  {
    "invoice_number": "INV-2026-003",
    "customer_name": "QuickShop Ltd",
    "customer_email": "billing@quickshop.example.com",
    "customer_code": "QS001",
    "amount": 8500.0,
    "amount_net": 7024.79,
    "currency": "EUR",
    "due_date": "2026-02-08",
    "days_overdue": 35,
    "description": "Maintenance contract \u2014 monthly",
    "language": "en"
  },
  {
    "invoice_number": "INV-2026-002",
    "customer_name": "TechCorp GmbH",
    "customer_email": "finance@techcorp.example.com",
    "customer_code": "TC001",
    "amount": 12800.0,
    "amount_net": 10743.7,
    "currency": "EUR",
    "due_date": "2026-03-01",
    "days_overdue": 14,
    "description": "Software license renewal",
    "language": "de"
  },
  {
    "invoice_number": "INV-2026-001",
    "customer_name": "BuildRight BV",
    "customer_email": "accounts@buildright.example.com",
    "customer_code": "BR001",
    "amount": 4250.0,

    "currency": "EUR",
    "due_date": "2026-03-13",
    "days_overdue": 2,
    "description": "Consulting services \u2014 Q1 2026",
    "language": "nl"
  }
]

input.subject: Vriendelijke herinnering: Factuur INV-2026-001
input.body:
Hallo,

We hopen dat het goed met u gaat! Dit is slechts een vriendelijke herinnering dat we onlangs uw betaling hebben verwacht voor de volgende factuur:

**Factuurnummer:** INV-2026-001
**Bedrag:** €4.250,00
**Vervaldatum:** 13 maart 2026

Zou u deze betaling alstublieft zo spoedig mogelijk kunnen voldoen? Mocht u al betaald hebben, dan kunt u deze herinnering negeren.

Heeft u nog vragen of twijfels, neem dan gerust contact met ons op.

Vriendelijke groeten,
AI Agency Test BV
finance@aiagency.example.com
+31612345678

input.subject: Zahlungserinnerung: Rechnung INV-2026-002
input.body:
Sehr geehrte Damen und Herren,

wir möchten Sie höflich auf folgende ausstehende Rechnung hinweisen, die sich bereits um zwei Wochen verzögert:

**Rechnungsnummer:** INV-2026-002
**Betrag:** €12.800,00
**Fälligkeitsdatum:** 1. März 2026

Könnten Sie uns bitte mitteilen, wann Sie diese Zahlung tätigen können? Sollte es bereits bezahlt worden sein, bitten wir um Entschuldigung und können diese Mitteilung ignoriert werden.

Bei Fragen oder Unstimmigkeiten kontaktieren Sie uns gerne.

Mit freundlichen Grüßen,
AI Agency Test BV
finance@aiagency.example.com
+31612345678

input.subject: FINAL NOTICE: Invoice INV-2026-003 – Immediate Payment Required
input.body:
Dear QuickShop Ltd,

We must bring to your immediate attention that Invoice INV-2026-003 remains outstanding for over one month and requires urgent settlement.

**Invoice Number:** INV-2026-003
**Amount:** €8.500,00
**Due Date:** 8 February 2026
**Days Overdue:** 35

This invoice is now significantly overdue, and we require payment to be made immediately. If payment has already been sent, please provide us with proof of payment immediately.

If there are any disputes regarding this invoice or genuine difficulties preventing payment, you must contact us without further delay.

We trust this matter will be resolved urgently.

Yours sincerely,
AI Agency Test BV
finance@aiagency.example.com
+31612345678
